title: The Eternal Skald
description:
An AI-powered storyteller, oracle interpreter, and tactical enemy controller for Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve campaigns in Foundry VTT v14. Powered by Abacus AI ChatLLM. Just type ! followed by your words to speak with the Skald, or !skald-help for all commands.

v0.3.3 — the Skald now streams its replies in real time, rendering each word as the AI speaks it for near-instant feedback instead of waiting for the whole reply. Streaming is on by default (toggle in module settings) and falls back automatically to a buffered reply if it is ever unavailable, so narration, move suggestions, and mechanical effects all behave exactly as before. Builds on the v0.3.2 bare ! alias and AI Mode master toggle, v0.3.1 compendium-based enemy ranks, and the v0.3.0 automatic combat system — combat progress tracks per foe, harm by rank on Strike/Clash hits, initiative through Enter the Fray — on top of deep integration with the foundry-ironsworn rules engine (suggesting moves, triggering the system's own roll mechanics, narrating official outcomes, and applying mechanical effects). Works standalone too — Ironsworn features activate automatically when the system is present.

recommends.reason: Optional but recommended. When the Ironsworn system is active, the Skald integrates with its rules engine to trigger moves, read character state, and narrate official roll outcomes. The module also works standalone in any system, but Ironsworn-specific mechanics are then unavailable.
